title: Chicken Sausage & Lemon Pasta

seo.title: Chicken Sausage & Lemon Pasta - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 250 ml fresh cream
  • 2 jumbo egg yolks
  • 5 – 15 ml finely grated garlic
  • 65 ml coarsely chopped parsley
  • 45 ml fresh lemon juice
  • 30 ml finely grated lemon zest
  • 250 ml finely grated Parmesan cheese
  • 300 g chicken sausages (chipolatas)
  • 15 ml olive oil
  • 30 ml butter
  • 500 ml cooked, drained penne pasta (already salted and peppered to taste)

Method

In a bowl, whisk together the cream, egg yolks, garlic, parsley, lemon juice and zest, and cheese. Cover and set aside for later.

Slice the sausages lengthwise, just through the skin.

Carefully remove the skins so that you still have sausages, just bare.

Fry the sausages in the butter and oil in a pan until browned.

Remove from the pan and slice the sausages into thin diagonal slices.

Put the sausages back in the pan together with the pasta.

Reheat the pan with the sausages and pasta, then add the cream mixture. Stir slowly and gently over low heat until the cream is piping hot and the egg yolks have thickened the cream.

Remove the pan from the heat and dish up immediately.

Serves 4 with lemon wedges and a basil and rocket salad.

Easy!
